phrases.intent_en: Ask where the warm-water fountain is on the avenue
phrases.text_local: Où se trouve la fontaine d'eau chaude ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo suh TROOV lah fon-TEN doh SHOHD
phrases.cultural_note: The Fontaine d'Eau Chaude on the Cours Mirabeau runs naturally warm water from the Roman thermal springs beneath the city. Touch the mossy surface to feel the warmth.

responses.english: In the middle of the Cours, on your right.
responses.phonetic: oh mee-LYUH doo KOOR, soor voh-truh DRWAHT
responses.local: Au milieu du Cours, sur votre droite.

phrases.intent_en: Ask for a table at a café on the shaded side
phrases.text_local: Avez-vous une table côté ombragé, s'il vous plaît ?
phrases.pronunciation: ah-VAY voo oon TAH-bluh koh-TAY ohm-brah-ZHAY, seel voo PLEH
phrases.cultural_note: The north side of the Cours Mirabeau (under the plane trees) is the shaded café side; the south side has private mansions called hôtels particuliers. The best cafés — Les Deux Garçons, Café de la Mairie — are on the north.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if the café terraces are open now
phrases.text_local: Les terrasses des cafés sont-elles ouvertes ?
phrases.pronunciation: lay teh-RAHS day kah-FAY sohn-TEL oo-VEHRT
phrases.cultural_note: The café terraces on the north side of the Cours Mirabeau are the social heart of Aix. Les Deux Garçons is the most famous.

phrases.intent_en: Ask for directions to the market from here
phrases.text_local: Pour aller au marché de la Place Richelme depuis le Cours Mirabeau ?
phrases.pronunciation: poor ah-LAY oh mar-SHAY duh lah PLAHS reesh-ELM duh-PWEE luh KOOR mee-rah-BOH
phrases.cultural_note: Place Richelme's daily morning market is just a short walk north through the old town lanes. The Saturday market also spills over to nearby Place des Prêcheurs.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the nearest public toilets are
phrases.text_local: Où sont les toilettes les plus proches ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo sohn lay twah-LET lay ploo PROSH
phrases.cultural_note: Free public toilets (sanisettes) can be found near Place de la Rotonde and Place de la Mairie. Most cafés also allow access if you are a customer.

responses.phonetic: preh duh lah PLAHS duh lah roh-TOHND
responses.local: Près de la Place de la Rotonde.

phrases.intent_en: Ask a waiter to recommend a local speciality
phrases.text_local: Que me recommandez-vous comme spécialité locale ?
phrases.pronunciation: kuh muh ruh-koh-mahn-DAY voo kum spay-syah-lee-TAY loh-KAL
phrases.cultural_note: Calissons — almond-shaped sweets made from candied melon and almonds coated in royal icing — are the iconic sweet of Aix. Ask for them at any pâtisserie along the Cours or nearby.

responses.phonetic: zhuh voo kohn-SAY luh plah doo ZHOOR
responses.local: Je vous conseille le plat du jour.
